name: MC Operator
description: Operate Mission Control (MC) boards via REST API. Manage tasks, board memory, comments, heartbeats, agents, board groups, and skill marketplace.

name: Repository Ecosystem Evaluator
description: Evaluate repositories for architecture quality, semantic design coherence, and stack fit using standardized static metrics plus ATAM-lite and ISO/IEC 25010-aligned heuristics.

name: OpenClaw Agent Creator
description: Create and bootstrap new OpenClaw agents and their workspaces. Prepares SOUL.md, IDENTITY.md, TOOLS.md, BOOTSTRAP.md, HEARTBEAT.md and other workspace files.

name: OpenClaw Audit
description: Audit an OpenClaw installation for security, configuration, and workspace content quality. Covers openclaw.json, agent workspace files, and security settings.

name: Serena Source Consultation
description: Use Serena plus local docs/source mirrors to verify real system behavior before making claims about architecture, configuration, hooks, or agent behavior.

name: Skill Creator
description: Create new CLI skills following best practices with zero manual configuration. Automates brainstorming, template application, validation, and installation.

name: Prompt Improver
description: Analyze and improve prompts for LLM interactions. Applies prompt engineering best practices to increase clarity, specificity, and output quality.

name: MinerU Document Parser
description: Parse PDF, Word, PPT, and images to Markdown via the MinerU API. Supports formulas, tables, and OCR. Ideal for academic papers and document extraction.

name: SkillCheck
description: Validate Claude Code skills against the agentskills specification. Catches structural, semantic, and naming issues before users do.

name: Skills Discovery
description: Search for and install Agent Skills that give you specialized capabilities. Proactively identifies when a skill would improve task quality.

name: Task Tracker
description: Personal task management with daily standups and weekly reviews. Supports Work and Personal tasks from Obsidian-based workflows.
